title: Vogue Style Fashion Illustration
sourceTitle: Turn This Photo Into Vogue Style Fashion
prompt: Turn this photo into a Vogue-style fashion illustration, preserving identity and facial features. Minimalist hand-drawn fashion sketch with elegant elongated proportions, bold black ink contours, loose confident linework, flat marker colors, abstract blush accents, graphic lips, stylized eyes, expressive ink hair, and simplified geometric clothing. Clean white background, scanned paper texture, modern luxury editorial fashion illustration
